changes.value:
## What
Copy the `model/` module from `vendor/sem/crates/sem-core/src/model/` into `crates/swissarmyhammer-sem/src/model/`. This is ~490 lines of pure Rust with no external deps beyond serde.

Files to copy:
- `model/mod.rs` → `src/model/mod.rs`
- `model/entity.rs` → `src/model/entity.rs` (SemanticEntity, build_entity_id)
- `model/change.rs` → `src/model/change.rs` (ChangeType, SemanticChange)
- `model/identity.rs` → `src/model/identity.rs` (match_entities, MatchResult, SimilarityFn)

These are pure data types + matching logic. Copy as-is, no modifications needed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `swissarmyhammer_sem::model::entity::SemanticEntity` compiles
- [ ] `swissarmyhammer_sem::model::change::{ChangeType, SemanticChange}` compiles
- [ ] `swissarmyhammer_sem::model::identity::match_entities` compiles
- [ ] All types are `pub` re-exported from `model/mod.rs`

## Tests
- [ ] `cargo check -p swissarmyhammer-sem` passes
- [ ] Existing identity matching unit tests from sem-core are preserved and pass
SEM-1: Harvest model/ module (entity, change, identity)
